# Glpi Tools

## Overview

gSage AI тАФ GLPI Create Ticket tool.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `glpi_create_ticket` | Create a new GLPI Ticket (Incident or Service Request) with title, description, and priority | `glpi:write` | тЬУ | тАФ |
| `glpi_dashboard` | Managerial GLPI dashboards: per group/status, technician workload, stalled, SLA breaches, top requesters, mean TTR and trend | `glpi:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `glpi_get_group_members` | List members of a GLPI group (with optional recursive sub-group expansion) | `glpi:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `glpi_get_item` | Retrieve a single GLPI item (ticket, asset, user) by its numeric ID | `glpi:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `glpi_search` | Search any GLPI itemtype (tickets, assets, users) using the GLPI search engine | `glpi:read` | тАФ | тАФ |
| `glpi_update_ticket` | Update an existing GLPI ticket: add notes, change status, or assign users | `glpi:write` | тЬУ | тАФ |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below тАФ set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "app_token": "",
  "url": "",
  "user_token": ""
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `app_token` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | `""` | GLPI application token. |
| `url` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | `""` | GLPI REST API base URL. |
| `user_token` | `string` | тАФ | тАФ | `""` | GLPI user token. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_GLPI__APP_TOKEN` | `app_token` | `string` | `""` | тАФ | GLPI application token. |
| `TOOL_GLPI__URL` | `url` | `string` | `""` | тАФ | GLPI REST API base URL. |
| `TOOL_GLPI__USER_TOKEN` | `user_token` | `string` | `""` | тАФ | GLPI user token. |
| `TOOL_GLPI_CREATE_TICKET__AUTO_APPROVE` | `auto_approve` | `boolean` | `false` | тАФ | When true, HITL approval requests for this tool are auto-approved by the backend without human review. Useful for lab/dev environments. DB toolconfig overrides env TOOL_<NAME>__AUTO_APPROVE; default is false. |
| `TOOL_GLPI_UPDATE_TICKET__AUTO_APPROVE` | `auto_approve` | `boolean` | `false` | тАФ | When true, HITL approval requests for this tool are auto-approved by the backend without human review. Useful for lab/dev environments. DB toolconfig overrides env TOOL_<NAME>__AUTO_APPROVE; default is false. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` тАФ useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `glpi_search`

- **`search`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `itemtype` | `string` | тЬУ | GLPI itemtype to search. Use 'Ticket' for incidents/requests, 'Computer' / 'NetworkEquipment' / 'Software' for assets, 'User' / 'Group' for people, 'KnowbaseItem' for the knowledge base. |
  | `quick_search` | `string` | тАФ | Simple free-text search: searches the given string across multiple relevant fields for the itemtype using OR/contains logic. No need to know field IDs. Ticket/Problem/Change/KnowbaseItem: searches name and full description. Computer/asset types: searches name and serial number. User: searches name and email. Cannot be combined with 'keyword' or 'criteria'. |
  | `keyword` | `string` | тАФ | Full-text search on item name/title only (field 1). Convenience shortcut тАФ equivalent to a 'contains' criterion on field 1. For broader multi-field search, use 'quick_search' instead. |
  | `criteria` | `array` | тАФ | Raw GLPI search criteria array for advanced queries. Use the 'list_fields' action first to discover valid field IDs. Each object: {field (int), searchtype (string), value (string), link (optional: AND/OR/AND NOT/OR NOT)}. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `user` | `string` | тАФ | Filter assets by the assigned user's login name (field 70). Applies to Computer, Monitor, NetworkEquipment, Peripheral, Phone, Printer. Uses 'contains' matching тАФ partial names work. Example: user='heles' finds all computers assigned to any user whose login contains 'heles'. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `group` | `string` | тАФ | Filter assets by the assigned group name (field 71). Applies to Computer, Monitor, NetworkEquipment, Peripheral, Phone, Printer. Uses 'contains' matching. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `technician` | `string` | тАФ | Ticket filter: assigned technician (field 5 = Ticket_User type=2). Only applies when itemtype='Ticket'. Accepts a user login (e.g. 'raquel.cardoso') тАФ resolved to user_id automatically тАФ or a numeric user_id string. Combine with status='open' to see what a technician still needs to handle. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `requester` | `string` | тАФ | Ticket filter: requester / reporter (field 4 = Ticket_User type=1). Only applies when itemtype='Ticket'. Accepts a user login or numeric user_id. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `watcher` | `string` | тАФ | Ticket filter: observer / watcher (field 22 = Ticket_User type=3). Only applies when itemtype='Ticket'. Accepts a user login or numeric user_id. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `technician_group` | `string` | тАФ | Ticket filter: assigned technician group (field 8). Only applies when itemtype='Ticket'. Accepts a group completename or numeric group_id. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `requester_group` | `string` | тАФ | Ticket filter: requester group (field 71). Only applies when itemtype='Ticket'. Accepts a group completename or numeric group_id. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `sort_field` | `integer` | тАФ | ID of the searchOption to sort results by (default: 19 = date_mod descending for Ticket, 1 = name for others). Use 'list_fields' to discover valid sort field IDs. |
  | `fields` | `array` | тАФ | Extra searchOption field IDs to include in each result row (merged with the default forcedisplay set). Useful to fetch additional fields without a follow-up get_item call. Example for User: [1, 9, 34, 5] (login, realname, email, phone). Use action='list_fields' to discover valid IDs for the itemtype. |

- **`list_fields`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `criteria` | `array` | тАФ | Raw GLPI search criteria array for advanced queries. Use the 'list_fields' action first to discover valid field IDs. Each object: {field (int), searchtype (string), value (string), link (optional: AND/OR/AND NOT/OR NOT)}. Cannot be combined with 'quick_search'. |
  | `sort_field` | `integer` | тАФ | ID of the searchOption to sort results by (default: 19 = date_mod descending for Ticket, 1 = name for others). Use 'list_fields' to discover valid sort field IDs. |
  | `fields` | `array` | тАФ | Extra searchOption field IDs to include in each result row (merged with the default forcedisplay set). Useful to fetch additional fields without a follow-up get_item call. Example for User: [1, 9, 34, 5] (login, realname, email, phone). Use action='list_fields' to discover valid IDs for the itemtype. |


### `glpi_update_ticket`

- **`update`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `status` | `integer` | тАФ | New ticket status: 1=New, 2=Assigned, 3=Planned, 4=Waiting, 5=Solved, 6=Closed. Used by action='update'. |
  | `priority` | `integer` | тАФ | New priority (1тАУ6). Used by action='update' or 'escalate_priority'. |
  | `urgency` | `integer` | тАФ | New urgency (1тАУ5). Used by action='update'. |
  | `impact` | `integer` | тАФ | New impact (1тАУ5). Used by action='update'. |
  | `category_id` | `integer` | тАФ | GLPI ITILCategory ID. Used by action='update'. |
  | `name` | `string` | тАФ | New ticket title. Used by action='update'. |
  | `content` | `string` | тАФ | New ticket description. Used by action='update'. |

- **`add_followup`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `followup_content` | `string` | тАФ | Text of the follow-up comment to add. Required for action='add_followup'. |
  | `is_private` | `boolean` | тАФ | Whether the follow-up is visible only to technicians. Used by action='add_followup'. Default: false (public). |

- **`add_solution`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `solution_content` | `string` | тАФ | Description of the resolution. Required for action='add_solution'. Also used by action='close' to record a solution before closing. |
  | `solution_type_id` | `integer` | тАФ | GLPI SolutionType ID. Optional for action='add_solution'. Common IDs vary by GLPI install тАФ query /SolutionType to discover. |

- **`assign`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `status` | `integer` | тАФ | New ticket status: 1=New, 2=Assigned, 3=Planned, 4=Waiting, 5=Solved, 6=Closed. Used by action='update'. |
  | `assigned_user_id` | `integer` | тАФ | GLPI User ID. Used by action='assign' to add the user as assignee, or action='unassign' to remove the user from the assignees. At least one of assigned_user_id / assigned_group_id is required. |
  | `assigned_group_id` | `integer` | тАФ | GLPI Group ID. Used by action='assign' or 'unassign'. |

- **`unassign`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `assigned_user_id` | `integer` | тАФ | GLPI User ID. Used by action='assign' to add the user as assignee, or action='unassign' to remove the user from the assignees. At least one of assigned_user_id / assigned_group_id is required. |
  | `assigned_group_id` | `integer` | тАФ | GLPI Group ID. Used by action='assign' or 'unassign'. |

- **`close`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `status` | `integer` | тАФ | New ticket status: 1=New, 2=Assigned, 3=Planned, 4=Waiting, 5=Solved, 6=Closed. Used by action='update'. |
  | `solution_content` | `string` | тАФ | Description of the resolution. Required for action='add_solution'. Also used by action='close' to record a solution before closing. |

- **`escalate_priority`** тАФ _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `priority` | `integer` | тАФ | New priority (1тАУ6). Used by action='update' or 'escalate_priority'. |
